_purpose: Bidirectional bridge between LOVS canonical zone_ids (lower_snake_case used in this repo's snapshot_contract.json source_zones) and INRB-UMIE canonical Noms (per https://github.com/INRB-UMIE/Ebola_DRC_2026/blob/main/data/shapefiles/DRC_Health_zones.shp). INRB-UMIE internal spelling variants must be collapsed via the upstream data/aliases.csv first; this bridge takes the post-collapse INRB canonical and maps to LOVS canonical.
_two_stage_resolution_pipeline: Stage 1 (upstream): raw INRB raw rows -> INRB canonical Nom (e.g. Nyankunde -> Nyakunde via aliases.csv).
Stage 2 (this bridge): INRB canonical Nom -> LOVS canonical zone_id (e.g. Nyakunde -> nyankunde via lovs_to_inrb inverse).
_review_cadence: Revisit when LOVS snapshot_contract.json source_zones changes, or when INRB-UMIE upstream changes its canonical Nom set.
_vendored_inrb_upstream_aliases_note: The INRB-UMIE GitHub release tarball does NOT ship the source repo's data/aliases.csv. We vendor a minimal copy below so the loader can perform Stage 1 collapse without a separate network fetch. If the upstream aliases.csv changes a row that affects a LOVS source zone, update this list and re-run tests. Pulled from https://github.com/INRB-UMIE/Ebola_DRC_2026/blob/main/data/aliases.csv on 2026-05-28.
